title: TXTperpus Curation Workflow
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"9ck02","text":"The steps for curating journal articles at TXTperpus. Ensuring the curated data is accurate and precise. What is expected from this workflow is to generate textual data from each article.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
guidelines: {"blocks":[{"key":"fpjjj","text":"Please ensure the data you copy is accurate and without any changes. There may be typos, but this project does not aim to change them. Use the latest PDF reader for accuracy of collected text.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
warning: {"blocks":[{"key":"f9m1c","text":"Make sure the article has an open licence and does not have a \"no derivatives\" type.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Open the article you want to curate. Ensure the PDF file is available for viewing or downloading. Ensure the article is licensed under Creative Commons and is not a No Derivatives Works (ND) licence.
If the article is not available, search for other sources such as Garba Rujukan Digital , ResearchGate , or Google Scholar . It is possible that articles are deposited in institutional repositories.

Copy the text from the title, authors' names, abstract, and keywords. For affiliations, ensure the top-level institution is selected, and if there are multiple affiliations, only the first-mentioned institution is used. Be sure to include the year, volume, and article number.
If it is not available, then only the metadata available in the journal is taken.

Copy the body of the article according to the Introduction, Methods, Results, and Discussion (IMRaD) categories, adding a conclusion section. If the article has a combined Results and Discussion section, extract the combined section and paste it into the provided field.
It is possible that the structure does not follow IMRaD. An assessment of the existing articles is necessary to ensure compliance.
creator: Faizhal Arif Faizhal Santosa
